text:
The only stable, humane, and psychologically healthy future for a society with advanced general AI and robotics is AI‑augmented human work, not AI‑replaced human work.

Instead of replacing humans, Al should:
- Enhance human workers 
- Extend human capability
- Assist in complex

Fifteen years have passed since that fateful day on February 15, 2011. Every day I reflect on the bravery and ultimate sacrifice of Special Agent Jaime Zapata and what we faced together. My return to public service is dedicated in his honor and memory. Rest in peace, brother. -
